title: look — live demo
description: Rhost Vision room display: left-aligned header/sections, player role tag, exits prefixed with their first alias.

state.description: A tall figure in a worn leather jacket, eyes scanning the room. Faded street tats run down both arms; a chrome neural port glints at the temple.

state.name: Strongbox
state.description: A battered steel strongbox bolted to the floor. The dial is worn smooth from use.

room.name: The Void
room.description: A featureless void, stretching endlessly in all directions.

exits.name: Market;m;shop
exits.description: A bustling open-air market — vendors hawking everything from fresh fruit to questionable chrome.

exits.name: Secret Hatch;h
exits.description: A grated steel hatch flush with the floor, almost invisible under the dust.

steps.note: Left-aligned header (===== Title …===), player row with role tag + idle + short-desc, exits in their own section. Exits named `Name;alias0;…` render as `<alias0> Name`. Exit sections are derived from each exit's TYPE attribute (set in-game via `&type <exit>=<value>` or `@exittype`), sorted alphabetically. Untagged + cardinal exits auto-classify as `direction`; untagged + non-cardinal default to `exit`.
look <name> on a player shows their styled card: moniker + role tag, short-desc, full description, and idle.
look <exit> resolves by name or alias (alias[0] match works). The card shows the exit's description and its TYPE.
Non-room, non-player, non-exit targets render with header + description + contents (when not opaque).
